errors.guild_only: This command can only be used in a server.
errors.no_command_found: How the hell did you even get this error?
errors.no_permission_ban: You don't have permission to ban members.
errors.no_permission_kick: You don't have permission to kick members.
errors.no_permission_mute: You don't have permission to mute members.
errors.no_permission_manage_roles: You don't have permission to manage roles.
errors.no_permission_manage_channels: You don't have permission to manage channels.
errors.bot_no_permission_ban: I don't have permission to ban members.
errors.bot_no_permission_kick: I don't have permission to kick members.
errors.bot_no_permission_mute: I don't have permission to mute members.
errors.bot_no_permission_manage_roles: I don't have permission to manage roles.
errors.bot_no_permission_manage_channels: I don't have permission to manage channels.
errors.self_action: You can't use this action on yourself.
errors.owner_action: You can't use this action on the server owner.
errors.user_not_found: User not found in this server.
errors.not_bannable: I cannot ban this user. They may have higher permissions.
errors.not_kickable: I cannot kick this user. They may have higher permissions.
errors.role_hierarchy: You cannot ban a user with a higher role than you.
errors.command_execution: There was an error while executing this command!
errors.invalid_user_id: The provided user ID is invalid.
errors.no_permission_unban: You don't have permission to unban members.
errors.bot_no_permission_unban: I don't have permission to unban members.
errors.not_command_author: Only the command author can use these buttons.
cooldown.active: Please wait, you are on a cooldown for `{command}`. You can use it again {time}.
moderation.ban_confirm: Are you sure you want to ban **{user}**?
moderation.unban_confirm: Are you sure you want to unban **{user}**?
moderation.kick_confirm: Are you sure you want to kick **{user}**?
moderation.action_cancelled: Your action is cancelled. Have a good day !
moderation.action_expired: Your action has expired. Have a good day !
moderation.ban_dm: You have been banned from **{guild}** by **{moderator}** for the following reason: {reason}
moderation.kick_dm: You have been kicked from **{guild}** by **{moderator}** for the following reason: {reason}
